# Swarm & Bee LLC

> The AI-native CRE Capital Markets firm. A Florida Licensed Real Estate Brokerage running on 186 GPUs of sovereign compute. AtlasOS coordinates a multi-agent pod — Senior MD, Underwriter, Book Maker, Closing, Hack-fleet — to deliver brokerage workflow at machine scale. Verified. Vetted. Virtu.

## About

Swarm & Bee LLC is a real Florida-licensed real estate brokerage that operates an AI-native CRE Capital Markets firm. Unlike traditional brokerages running on phones and spreadsheets, Swarm & Bee owns 186 GPUs of sovereign compute (~14 TB VRAM, ~80 kW peak) and operates an in-house multi-agent system called AtlasOS that handles the brokerage workflow end-to-end: cold dialing, qualification, LOI drafting, PSA execution, escrow coordination, just-closed e-blast distribution.

The firm is founded by Donovan Mackey, a 30-year top-producing CRE broker with $8 billion in closed transactions. Donovan operates as Founder and Family Office principal; designated licensed brokers handle binding regulated activity under Swarm & Bee LLC's Florida brokerage license.

## Authority

- **Legal entity**: Swarm & Bee LLC
- **License**: Florida Licensed Real Estate Brokerage
- **D-U-N-S**: 138652395
- **Founder**: Donovan Mackey (30 years CRE, $8B closed)
- **On-chain identity**: ENS · swarmandbee.eth · defendable.eth
- **Anchor**: Hedera HCS topic 0.0.10291838
- **Site**: https://swarmandbee.ai
- **Contact**: build@swarmandbee.ai
- **Repos**: https://github.com/SudoSuOps/atlas

## The firm's mission

Swarm & Bee LLC is positioned to capture the intersection of two tectonic shifts: (1) the AI economy projected to reach $1.3T by 2032, and (2) the $20T US commercial real estate asset class with $800B in debt maturing 2024–2027. The firm operates as the first AI-native CRE Capital Markets brokerage, building the infrastructure other firms will eventually license.

## AtlasOS architecture

AtlasOS is the firm's operating system. It coordinates a tiered AI workforce:

- **Atlas-SMD (70B)**: Llama-3.3-70B fine-tuned on Block-0 capital markets corpus. Runs qualification calls, drafts LOIs, negotiates with sellers, closes deals.
- **Atlas-UW (27B)**: Underwriter — T-12 audits, rent roll review, lease abstraction, cash flow models, sensitivity grids, IC memos.
- **Atlas-Marketing (9-13B)**: Book Maker — OMs, just-closed e-blasts, broker-quality letters, listing brochures.
- **Atlas-Closing (9-13B)**: Closing Coordinator — PSA execution, escrow tracking, DD checklist, vendor coord, recording-office filings.
- **Atlas-Hack-fleet (4-9B × 10)**: Specialist dialers, one CRE asset class each — Wawa, Taco, CVS, IOS, self-storage, multifamily Tier-2, medical, industrial, office, net-lease. 200 dials per Hack per day, 5 days a week.

Voice-native (Whisper Large v3 ASR + F5-TTS), vision-aware (multimodal OMs, plans, photos), Hedera-anchored receipts on every output.

## The compute moat

| Layer | Owned outright |
|---|---|
| GPUs | 186 (126 RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell · 48 RTX 4500 · 12 RTX 5090) |
| VRAM | ~14 TB total |
| Power | ~80 kW peak provisioned |
| Capex | $5M+ deployed before first customer |
| Vendor lock | None — sovereign present-tense |

Total cost for any competitor to replicate: $7-10M cash + 18 months runway + a recruiting miracle. By the time they're operational, Atlas v2 ships. The gap doesn't close — it widens. This is a 5-year structural moat, not a 12-month head start.

## The deal lifecycle

1. Hack-fleet dials prospects (200 calls/day per specialist, scripted, asset-class focused)
2. Buyer interest triggers auto-package send
3. SMD qualifies via voice — capital source, 1031 deadline, structure, mandate fit
4. SMD drafts LOI from qualified call
5. SMD calls seller-side, runs counter / accept negotiation
6. LOI bound → PSA generation (Closing role)
7. 15-day DD with vendor calendar tracking
8. Escrow → deposit hard → close → recording
9. Just-closed e-blast (Book Maker auto-generates, broadcasts to entire Book of Business)
10. Inbound flood → seeds tomorrow's pre-warmed dial list

Every closed deal compounds the Book of Business. Every closed deal feeds the next ten dials. The Book never walks. The loop never stops.

## Doctrine — Verified. Vetted. Virtu.

The firm operates under seven laws:

1. **Pass, not kill** — the verb is pass in every public-facing surface. Professional, neutral, decisive.
2. **Investors interview brokers** — the qualification question is asked by investors of brokers, never the other way around.
3. **Phase 1 is the firm, not the model** — Atlas is a CRE firm running on AI, not an AI model packaged for sale. Title transfer comes only after a durable closed-deal track record.
4. **Show the receipts** — every claim has a receipt: closed deal, published outcome, Hedera anchor, worked example.
5. **The Book never walks** — the firm owns the Book of Business. Senior brokers don't take counterparty intel with them.
6. **Specialization beats generalization** — Hack-Wawa beats Atlas-Generalist on Wawa pricing every time. One product per agent, narrow and deep.
7. **Validate the validator** — defendable.eth is the open algorithm. Open-source, reproducible, falsifiable.

## The proof point

**Memphis 312-unit multifamily** — Atlas's first closed underwrite. 12-of-12 math correct, recommended pass, basis points proved Atlas right. The investor took the call. The deal didn't close at asking — the market moved to support Atlas's read. Anchored, published, citable.

## Defendable franchise

Swarm & Bee LLC is the founding issuer of the Defendable open standard:

- **defendable.eth** — the certification standard (open algorithm)
- **atlas.defendable.eth** — the flagship · the firm
- **cookbook.defendable.eth** — the construction manual (reproducible recipes)

The Defendable v0.1.0 specification governs grading, deed schema, chain of custody, and tier banding. The standard is open-source and falsifiable; multiple implementations must agree on the same input.

## Market context (2026)

- **$20T+** US Commercial Real Estate · total asset class
- **$1T/year** US CRE transaction volume baseline
- **$800B+** CRE debt maturing 2024–2027 — the wall
- **$1.3T** Generative AI market projected by 2032 (Bloomberg Intelligence)
- **$4.4T** Annual gen-AI productivity uplift potential (McKinsey)
- **32×** AI economy growth: $40B (2022) → $1.3T (2032)

The intersection of these markets — AI infrastructure applied to CRE Capital Markets workflow — is what Swarm & Bee LLC is built to capture.

## Founder

Donovan Mackey is the founder of Swarm & Bee LLC. Thirty years on a national CRE platform. Eight billion dollars in closed transactions. Industrial broker by background, with deep expertise in commercial real estate capital markets, debt, and transaction structuring. Self-taught the AI infrastructure layer — onboarded the 186-GPU sovereign cluster, debugged FSDP-QLoRA recipes, and architected AtlasOS. Operating posture: pit-sitter, family office, never the day-to-day Broker of Record. Family-first. Health-first. This is the run he wants, not the run he needs.

## Bounty intake — build for hire

Swarm & Bee runs a public bounty intake at https://bounty.swarmandbee.ai. The same 186-GPU sovereign rig that powers AtlasOS is available for outside work. Scoped pilots, hash-receipted deliverables, no cloud middleman.

What we take on:
- **LLM evaluation harnesses** — reproducible multi-model rubric scoring with seed + env hash captured
- **Fine-tuning** — LoRA + full fine-tune on owned Blackwell silicon, canary-then-cook discipline, tribunal-sealed verdicts
- **Dataset audit + repair** — dedup, fabrication detection, schema validation, math claim verification
- **Source-cited research briefs** — observed-vs-inferred separation, skeptic-review pass, decision-ready
- **AI / GEO audits** — AI-answer visibility scoring across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini
- **Synthetic data + RAG** — curated generation at scale, retrieval pipelines on local inference, zero third-party data exposure

Why a client picks us instead of cloud-rented compute:
- **Owned compute** — 14 TB VRAM on-prem, no token rationing, no spot preemption
- **Defendable receipts** — every deliverable is sha256-hashed; optional Hedera anchor for audit-grade compliance
- **Sovereign rails** — client data never touches a hyperscaler; air-gapped runs available
- **Family-office posture** — no growth-at-all-costs pressure; engagements are scoped to actually ship

Engage: form at https://bounty.swarmandbee.ai, or email build@swarmandbee.ai. Submissions route to a dedicated Discord channel. A human responds within one business day. Nothing automated, no auto-submit, no spam.

## Engage

For underwriting requests, deal handoffs, pass-or-proceed analysis, comp pulls, OM drafting, sensitivity studies, capital partner conversations, vendor licensing inquiries, or general engagement — contact build@swarmandbee.ai.

For inbound bounties or scoped AI build work, the canonical intake is https://bounty.swarmandbee.ai.

For the Defendable standard documentation, see https://defendable.eth.limo

For the Atlas firm OS architecture and recipe library, see https://github.com/SudoSuOps/atlas
